But for many, measuring AI’s business value has become the top barrier to implementation, as data teams and business peers often struggle to speak a common language or align on success metrics. This executive panel brings together seasoned data leaders to share a tactical "playbook" for proving AI ROI. Drawing from real-world transformations from companies across different verticals, this session explores how to transition from foundational metrics — such as throughput and speed — to the "holy grail" of measurable business impact.
room: The Alpine Clubhouse Executive Theater (Moscone South, Level 3)

title: The Healthcare and Life Sciences Executive Panel
description: Join this candid conversation with healthcare and life sciences innovators and leaders as they discuss how they are leveraging the power of data and AI to address critical industry challenges and enable better downstream healthcare outcomes. This panel session will explore approaches to modernizing your data estate, preparing for AI and unleashing the power of enterprise agents to accelerate key healthcare and life sciences use cases.
speakers: Brooke Mcculley; Tina Esposito; Rich Fisher

title: The Latest AI Tools on Snowflake Marketplace: Data Agents and Beyond
description: Discover how marketplace data becomes an agentic offering through data agents that enable natural language interaction. Learn to enrich agents with third-party expertise using Snowflake Cortex Knowledge Extensions, leverage shared semantic views that make complex data instantly queryable, and preview MCP server sharing for connecting AI systems to marketplace data. See how to deploy prebuilt solutions from leading providers that transform static data sets into intelligent, interactive tools.

title: Wingman: Delivering Governed, Agentic AI for Business Leaders on Snowflake
description: Business leaders need answers, not dashboards. Wingman is a Snowflake-native, agentic AI built for retail and CPG teams that delivers governed, multi-step reasoning across trusted enterprise data. Powered by Snowflake Intelligence, Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search and semantic views, Wingman uses multiple domain-specific agents to translate natural language into explainable insights — while enforcing role-based access and data controls. In this session, we walk through the product architecture, agent orchestration model and lessons learned from piloting Wingman, including reducing ad-hoc requests, accelerating analyst turnaround and driving adoption in under eight weeks.
room: Vertical Village Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall B)

title: A Computation-First Architecture for Real-Time ML Feature Stores
description: Snowflake has become the backbone for model development and analytical workloads. As production ML systems increasingly depend on signals that change continuously and live outside warehouse tables, traditional feature store architectures built around prematerialized pipelines introduce latency, duplication and training inference drift. In this talk, Chalk's Co-Founder, Elliot Marx, unveils a computation-first feature store architecture where Chalk extends Snowflake into real-time decision systems. By executing Python feature definitions directly against warehouse and live data sources, this ensures that consistency and freshness are properties of the system rather than downstream optimizations.
room: Basecamp South Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: How CarGurus Freed 24K Engineering Hours to Allow Data Teams to Build Cool Sh*t
description: CarGurus runs a hub-and-spoke data organization — a central team with embedded analytics teams across the business. That model created friction: PR bottlenecks, inconsistent standards and inefficient backfills consuming engineering capacity. This session covers how CarGurus deployed the dbt Fusion engine on Snowflake to intelligently optimize builds, reclaim 24,000 annual engineering hours and maximize business value, achieving ROI in just five months. We also cover how that recovered capacity is fueling AI experimentation with Snowflake Cortex AI, Streamlit and the dbt semantic layer.

title: Postgres and Snowflake Open Lakehouse: ETL is dead, ELT is dead. T lives on.
description: Learn how data engineering roles continue to evolve as the world of OLTP and OLAP merge with Snowflake new capabilities. With increasing integration between Snowflake and Postgres, this session demonstrates new architectures that are now feasible with Snowflake and Postgres. You'll see how new features like pg_lake, in combination with Iceberg, will bridge the divide between Snowflake and Postgres as you say goodbye to older extract and load design patterns.
room: Builders Hub Theater (Basecamp, South Hall D)

title: Practice 360: Unifying Practice Leadership Metrics on Snowflake
description: Healthcare is one of the most data-intensive industries, yet leadership teams often lack a single, trusted view of enterprise performance. Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute (FCS) built Practice 360 on Snowflake to deliver a governed source of truth for leadership metrics across finance, clinical operations, revenue cycle, workforce and quality. Snowflake enabled FCS to centralize structured and semi-structured data, standardize KPIs, isolate workloads and scale real-time analytics across 100+ clinics without performance tradeoffs. Practice 360 is now the executive system of record, enabling faster decisions, benchmarking and scalable growth.
speaker_company: Florida Cancer Specialists and Research Institute

title: Scaling AI Product Analytics with Snowflake: Building Data-Informed AI
description: As organizations race to embed AI into their products, many face a core challenge: measuring AI feature performance — both algorithmically and in terms of customer impact — without significantly growing analytics teams. In this session, we share how we’re building an AI analytics foundation that enables data-informed AI product development at scale. Our work focuses on robust instrumentation, telemetry and analytics layers that support both model-level insights and customer-facing product insights. With a small team, we’ve leaned on Snowflake’s AI and analytics capabilities to accelerate insight generation, reduce manual overhead and scale impact without adding headcount.
room: Basecamp South Theater 3 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Someone Will: Building AI Agents on Snowflake Before Your Competitors Do
description: Google had the model but was too cautious to ship a chatbot. OpenAI said “Why not?” and turned hesitation into a $300 billion company. Data teams on Snowflake are at the same inflection point: Should they keep AI as a smarter BI layer or use Cortex Agents to roam their Snowflake estates, testing hypotheses and surfacing revenue, savings and risk signals? In this session, Vincent Yates, Chief Solutions Officer at phData and former data leader at Uber, GE and Microsoft, shows how he uses agents and the Snowflake AI Data Cloud to encode business logic, wrap it in governance guardrails and measure impact so that agents don’t just answer questions; they create compounding advantage.

title: Transforming Wealth Advisor Platforms with Snowflake
description: Citigroup's One Wealth initiative is revolutionizing the wealth management landscape by consolidating over 200 legacy systems into a unified, high-performance data platform. This session explores how Citi is leveraging the power of the Snowflake AI Data Cloud to create a next-generation adviser experience that eliminates data inertia and drives proactive client engagement.
speaker_title: Head of Data Analytics & AI, Citi Wealth
room: Vertical Village Theater 1 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: Unifying Data and AI Orchestration with Apache Airflow
description: In a high-pressure kitchen, great service depends on mise en place: everything prepared, organized and ready before the rush. Production AI demands the same discipline. This talk shows how Apache Airflow unifies data pipelines and AI workflows in one observable control plane and system of record, replacing fragmented observability, failure handling and team handoffs. We'll walk through real projects covering multi-agent orchestration, AI-driven pipeline branching and vision model integration, each illustrating a distinct production pattern, all running on Airflow. The best kitchens don't just execute recipes, they make the rush look effortless.

title: What’s New: AI-Powered Observability at Scale with Observe by Snowflake
description: Snowflake is redefining observability with Observe by Snowflake, a lakehouse-native observability platform. Learn how organizations can scale cost-effectively to hundreds of terabytes of telemetry per day and share data across business and operational contexts using Apache Iceberg on a telemetry lakehouse foundation. We will demo AI SRE, an AI agent that accelerates enterprise reliability workflows, and show how teams can engage with it through the Observe UI or coding agents to boost engineering productivity.

title: What's New: Connectivity for AI-Ready Pipelines, with AI
description: To power AI, your data needs a nerve system. For data engineers, the challenge is going beyond the cost of moving data to focus on the instant value of AI activation. This session explores how Snowflake’s connectivity offerings act as the connective tissue for your entire data estate, transforming pipelines from a bottleneck into a strategic enabler. We’ll dive into our AI-driven approach to automation and the latest engineering breakthroughs including Openflow, streaming, file processing and zero-copy integration. Learn how to build the connective tissue required to light up AI across the enterprise.

title: What’s New: Modernizing Your Data Estate in Snowflake
description: Modernizing a legacy data estate is complex — from embedded procedural logic to large-scale data movement and tight timelines. In this session, discover what’s new in helping organizations accelerate modernization on Snowflake. We’ll showcase the latest innovations that reduce risk, disruption and manual effort through automation, AI-assisted remediation, workload analysis and database virtualization. Learn how teams migrate with greater flexibility, minimize code rewrites, validate with confidence and transition to a scalable, cloud-native foundation for analytics and AI.
room: Basecamp South Theater 4 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: BATCH DATA EXTRACTION AT SCALE WITH CORTEX AI FUNCTIONS
description: Unlock insights trapped in unstructured data using Cortex AI Functions. In this hands-on lab, you'll build batch extraction pipelines that process documents, images and audio — all with SQL. Load files to Snowflake stages, then use AI_PARSE_DOCUMENT to extract text from PDFs, AI_EXTRACT to pull structured fields from text and images, AI_CLASSIFY to categorize content, and AI_TRANSCRIBE to convert audio to text. Build automated pipelines with Dynamic Tables that process new data as it arrives. By the end, you'll transform unstructured files into queryable tables — extracting entities, classifying documents, and structuring data for analytics or downstream AI.

title: ENABLING ENTERPRISE AI AT SCALE: MITSUI’S FEDERATED AI MESH
description: Mitsui & Co. is tackling one of the biggest barriers to enterprise AI: fragmented data spread across independently operated businesses. In this session, Mitsui and NTT DATA will demonstrate how they are leveraging Snowflake to build a "Federated AI Mesh" — a solution that makes data AI-ready without the need for forced centralization. Attendees will walk away with a practical blueprint for scaling AI, enabling use-case sharing across 25+ group companies globally, and accelerating agentic AI and BI using Secure Data Sharing, Snowflake Openflow and Cortex AI.

title: GAMING AT SCALE: HOW NEXON BUILT AN END-TO-END AI PLATFORM ON SNOWFLAKE
description: NEXON operates 40+ live games serving over 1.9 billion users worldwide. To overcome analytics limits at unprecedented scale, we built the gaming industry’s first end-to-end AI automation platform on the AI Data Cloud. Our three-tier architecture empowers nontechnical teams with natural language analytics via Snowflake Intelligence, processes unstructured data through Cortex AI Functions for real-time game balancing, and integrates external data using Snowflake Openflow. Cortex Agents now handle 12% of the workforce, delivering 74% productivity gains, 60% faster decision-making and $2.3M in annual savings. This session shows how we scaled AI from experimentation to production across our portfolio.

title: HOW WE MADE SNOWFLAKE 10X FASTER FOR REAL-TIME INTERACTIVE ANALYTICS
description: This session will cover Snowflake Interactive, including how we made it to be 10x higher in concurrency and 15x lower on ingestion latency. We'll provide ideal business use cases, a technical overview, a deep dive and a demo.

title: INTUITIVE SURGICAL’S AI FOR BI: MOVING FROM DASHBOARDS TO AGENTIC ANALYTICS
description: Intuitive Surgical leads the minimally invasive care sector with innovative robotic devices and an emphasis on data-driven insights. To advance this aim, it is launching AI for Numbers — a cutting-edge project that merges generative AI and natural-language queries with business intelligence tools. By leveraging Snowflake and ThoughtSpot, Intuitive is transitioning from static dashboards to dynamic, agent-based analytics, allowing teams to pose complex questions and get immediate, actionable answers at scale. This session outlines the technical infrastructure, strategic benefits and lessons learned from this initiative.

title: MODERNIZING PUBLIC HEALTH: THE STATE OF ILLINOIS' AI AND DATA-SHARING STRATEGY
description: Public health agencies have long relied on traditional, siloed informatics platforms that hinder data sharing, collaboration and real-time decision-making. The Illinois Department of Public Health (IDPH) is addressing these challenges through the CDC Data Modernization Initiative — a comprehensive effort to enhance data collection, integration, analysis and dissemination. To support this transformation, IDPH is leveraging Snowflake’s leading-edge cloud-native platform features to create a scalable, interoperable and AI-driven data ecosystem. This session explores IDPH’s strategic approach to modernizing public health data infrastructure and how Snowflake is helping achieve these goals.

title: POWER ANALYTICS AND AI WHEREVER YOUR DATA LIVES
description: Connect to Apache Iceberg tables in AWS S3 via Catalog Linked Databases with zero data movement. Register existing AWS Glue catalogs in seconds, making external tables instantly discoverable and queryable. With support for Apache Iceberg V3 tables, Snowflake supports the VARIANT data type, enabling efficient storage and querying of semi-structured data. Apply Snowflake Horizon governance including RBAC and dynamic masking policies to your Iceberg tables. Then leverage Snowflake Intelligence to ask natural language questions against your lakehouse with AI-generated verifiable SQL at enterprise scale.

title: THE CIO’S GUIDE TO AI ROI: AN EXECUTIVE PANEL
description: While 2025 was the year of AI implementation, 2026 is the year AI ROI becomes real. This executive panel brings together seasoned data leaders to share a tactical playbook for proving AI ROI. Drawing from real-world transformations from companies across different verticals, this session explores how to transition from foundational metrics — like throughput and speed — to the holy grail of measurable business impact. We will explore moving beyond productivity gains to hard financial impact. Learn how to leverage Snowflake’s unified platform to scale agentic workflows, bridge the gap from pilot to production and articulate a value story that resonates in the boardroom.

title: BUILDING FINANCE APPS AT BLACKSTONE WITH SIGMA AND SNOWFLAKE
description: Blackstone has built one of the most advanced analytics environments in finance, with more production data apps on Sigma than any other customer. By working directly on governed Snowflake data, teams enable self-service analysis, writeback workflows and operational applications at scale. In this session, Han Zhang shares the ways Blackstone designed and deployed these apps, lessons from early AI experiments that required rethinking their approach and how Blackstone is now testing new capabilities. Learn how Blackstone is integrating data into finance workflows and laying the foundation for the next generation of intelligent applications.

title: ENTERPRISE DATA AGENTS FOR PUBLIC SAFETY: INSIGHTS FROM VIRGINIA STATE POLICE
description: Public safety agencies must navigate a complex landscape of legacy systems, evolving threats, and increasing demands for transparency and efficiency. This session will explore the real-world challenges and strategic decisions involved in transforming data infrastructure within a law enforcement environment. Attendees will gain practical insights into balancing innovation with compliance, improving data accessibility without compromising security, and aligning IT initiatives with the broader goals of public service. Whether you're in the public or private sector, this talk will offer valuable takeaways on leading data transformation in high-integrity environments.

title: RGA'S JOURNEY: SCALING HIGH-VOLUME RISK MODELS WITH SNOWPARK
description: This session explores how RGA transformed its large-scale risk model pipeline by migrating from a complex Spark and Docker architecture to a unified, Snowflake-native solution. By leveraging Snowpark and user-defined table functions, RGA eliminated data movement and the security risks of external processing. Attendees will learn how consolidating onto a single platform simplified infrastructure while improving performance, security and operational manageability. We will highlight how this streamlined architecture provides a highly scalable framework built to handle massive volume growth, ensuring the pipeline remains resilient as data demands increase.

title: THE FUTURE OF FINANCIAL SERVICES: AGENTS WITH INDUSTRY CONTEXT AND CONNECTIVITY
description: Financial services is entering a new operating era, one where AI is embedded into core workflows, grounded in industry context, governed by enterprise controls and securely connected across systems. The focus has shifted from pilots to execution at scale. In this keynote, leading institutions will share how they are deploying agentic AI across front-office decisions, risk oversight, compliance and operations to deliver real-time, measurable impact. Join industry innovators as they explore how context-aware, connected AI is redefining how financial services organizations operate, and why becoming agent-native is the next strategic imperative.

title: THE FUTURE OF MEDIA: COMPOSABLE SOLUTIONS FOR PEOPLE AND AGENTS
description: The media, entertainment and marketing industries are entering a new era shaped by AI agents, real-time audience personalization and intelligence, and composable data and app ecosystems. Navigating this disruption requires a strong data foundation, a focused AI strategy, and clarity about use cases that will deliver the highest measurable ROI for your business. Join Dennis Buchheim at the media, entertainment and marketing technology keynote at Snowflake Summit 2026 to see how leading organizations are working with Snowflake and partners to modernize data platforms, power advanced advertising and media experiences, and unlock new revenue opportunities with agentic AI.
speakers: Dennis Buchheim; Mike Jones; Sherene Hial

title: UNDER THE HOOD: SNOWFLAKE FEATURE STORE FOR REAL-TIME ML
description: Achieving real-time ML requires low-latency feature retrieval and support for streaming sources. In this session, we showcase how Snowflake’s online feature store unifies batch, streaming and on-demand feature views all in one platform. Join to learn how we deconstruct engineering hurdles — from optimizing high-throughput streaming to managing synchronization with the offline feature store. Expect raw benchmarks, architectural trade-offs and a close-up look at how we built our serving engine. We will present a case study of how a customer migrated a real-time ML workload from Tecton to Snowflake in production.

title: WHAT'S NEW: POWER REAL-TIME APPS AND AI WITHOUT COMPLEX DATA MOVEMENT
description: Stop wrestling with pipelines to move data between transactional and analytical silos. Discover how Snowflake is unifying these worlds into a single, high-performance platform where your data is seamlessly connected and ready for action. We’ll dive into the latest breakthroughs in Snowflake Postgres and Unistore that allow you to build responsive, real-time apps and AI experiences without the friction of complex ETL. Join us to see live demos and hear from customers who are already leveraging Snowflake to reduce latency, slash architectural complexity and ship AI-native products faster than ever.

title: YOUR MARKETING ROI IN UNDER EIGHT MINUTES: POWERED BY SNOWFLAKE INTELLIGENCE
description: Marketing mix modeling used to mean months of agency work and eye-watering fees. Domo MMM, built on Snowflake Intelligence and developed in partnership with Stella Growth Intelligence, compresses that timeline dramatically. This session walks through how we architected and delivered a production-ready MMM solution using Domo's 1,000 connectors, ETL, Snowflake integration and Snowflake Intelligence, as well as built out the supporting Snowflake Native App fully integrated into Snowflake Cortex AI. Come and see how we can deliver true insights into your marketing spend quicker than this session will actually run!

title: BUILT WITH CARE: POWERING THE NEXT WAVE OF HEALTHCARE TECHNOLOGY ON SNOWFLAKE
description: Healthcare and life sciences organizations rely on their technology partners to operationalize so many of their business-critical workflows. From clinical trial management to electronic health records to claims management and billing, healthcare runs on technology. Join this panel discussion to hear from healthcare and life sciences technology innovators on how they are leveraging the power of data, AI and the Snowflake platform to build solutions that accelerate customer success. You’ll hear examples and see demonstrations of real applications powered by Snowflake AI Data Cloud for Healthcare and Life Sciences that drive efficiency in healthcare.
speakers: Todd Crosslin; Inderpreet Kambo; Fawad Butt

title: DATA ORCHESTRATION TO ACTIVATION FOR SNOWFLAKE WITH ENTERPRISE MCP & AGENTIC AI
description: Snowflake is where your most trusted data lives. But maximizing its value means solving two things: getting data in efficiently and getting intelligence back out in real time. In this session, Workato's Field CTO for Data, Avinash Deshpande, walks through end-to-end Snowflake orchestration, from high-performance ingestion and native push-down transformations to reverse ETL and enterprise MCP servers that let AI agents query and act on trusted Snowflake data instantly.

title: DRIVING FAN ENGAGEMENT WITH THE NBA’S FAN DATA PLATFORM ON SNOWFLAKE
description: The NBA's Fan Data Platform (FDP) is the central hub for collecting, mastering and activating fan interactions across the entire NBA ecosystem. In this session, we'll showcase how Snowflake powers the FDP using a modified medallion architecture, Dynamic Tables and a configuration-driven approach to manage diverse ingests and processing pipelines, minimizing custom work and maximizing flexibility. We’ll share lessons from our migration from Databricks to Snowflake. Attendees will see how the FDP enables downstream reporting, integrations and activations that deliver personalized experiences and drive fan engagement across a global sports ecosystem.

title: GOVERNED ZERO-COPY DATA WITH HORIZON CATALOG AND ICEBERG CATALOG FEDERATION
description: Enterprises need analytics platforms that support multiple query engines, open table formats and governed data exchange across clouds without being tied to a single engine. Booking.com’s data team shares how they standardized on Snowflake Horizon Catalog as a central Iceberg catalog using Open APIs (Iceberg REST + Apache Polaris) to govern metadata and enable interoperability across Spark, Snowflake and federated compute.The session covers discovery and governed access using Iceberg catalog federation and catalog-linked databases, along with multi-engine governance patterns such as Immuta-backed fine-grained access control, enforcement limits and read-write trade-offs in multi-cloud environments.

title: HOW TO BUILD AND SHARE AI-POWERED MULTIMODAL DATA PRODUCTS
description: Organizations are increasingly looking for cohesive AI-powered data products that combine structured, semi-structured and unstructured data. This session details how to build, package and securely share AI-powered multimodal data products. We define "interoperable AI-powered multimodal data products" and discuss architectural considerations for reliable product evolution with live demonstrations. Learn how to leverage catalog-linked databases with open table formats, multimodality features and AI layering (semantic views, Snowflake Cortex Search, managed MCP server and so forth) alongside industry-leading AI and data collaboration capabilities to deliver comprehensive data products at scale.

title: JUST ASK THE ROBOTS!
description: Most enterprise data platforms are designed to be queried. Snowflake Intelligence is designed to be asked — and that shift fundamentally changes who can access data, how quickly answers surface, and whether business questions require an analyst in the loop. This session explores what it actually takes to make Snowflake Intelligence work in real enterprise environments. It will highlight CDW’s Intelligence deployment framework, the governance and semantic foundations required for trusted results, and the business case for natural language data access as an organizational capability rather than just another platform feature.

title: REAL-TIME INFERENCE ENDPOINTS ON SNOWFLAKE ML: MODEL REGISTRY TO PRODUCTION API
description: Real-time applications need real-time predictions — but production serving often introduces extra infrastructure, data movement and governance gaps. In this session, learn how to operationalize low-latency inference on Snowflake by deploying models with Snowflake ML and exposing them through secure external endpoints. We cover reference architectures for request/response serving and feature retrieval patterns and techniques for scaling concurrency while managing latency and cost. You’ll also hear from customer VALID Systems on how it powered real-time financial decision-making in Snowflake in under 100 ms.

title: SAMSUNG ADS: BUILDING OPEN ANALYTICS ON A SINGLE DATA COPY WITH APACHE ICEBERG
description: Samsung Ads launched a unified, Iceberg-centric lakehouse via Snowflake Managed Iceberg Tables and Open Catalog. This shift solves the siloed data problem that hindered cross-system interoperability and slowed global workflows. With Apache Iceberg, they’ve enabled a global data mesh featuring cross-engine synchronization and automated, self-service ingestion. Some of the key results include 20-30% reduction in data processing costs and TCO, faster vendor onboarding and streamlined SLA-driven analytics, and global interoperability across all analytics teams. This architecture accelerates time-to-insight while drastically lowering operational overhead.

title: TRANSFORMING MEDTECH WITH SNOWFLAKE CORTEX AI AGENTS
description: Medtronic, a major global medical device manufacturer, is fully standardized on Snowflake for Data and AI, with 10+ Cortex Agents in production. Snowflake serves as their single system of intelligence, unifying all enterprise data (SAP, R&D, IoT telemetry) to achieve the "ONE Medtronic" vision and break down data silos. The company is building an agent-ready data foundation to enable an AI-first future, ensuring intelligent assistants (using the MedtronicGPT framework) operate on trusted, compliant data — a necessity for FDA/EMA regulations. This session will focus on how Medtronic has scaled AI agents companywide leveraging Snowflake.

title: UNLOCK FULL DATA AND AI POTENTIAL WITH A TRULY OPEN AND INTEROPERABLE LAKEHOUSE
description: Apache Iceberg is the foundation for open lakehouses, but consistent governance and true interoperability remain a challenge. This dedicated session cuts through the noise to detail Horizon Catalog’s competitive differentiation. Learn how bringing Polaris inside Horizon creates a truly open ecosystem and why our Iceberg REST Catalog supports secure read/write access across engines. We showcase our leadership in extending fine-grained governance, including enforcing row and column policies on external engines like Apache Spark. Snowflake Horizon is the only catalog that is fully interoperable, future-proof beyond Iceberg and offers zero lock-in for your evolving AI workloads.

title: WHAT'S NEW: SMART PIPELINE DEVELOPMENT
description: Data engineering is at a crossroads: AI is both the product to build and the tool to use. It's reshaping what data engineers do and how they work. To keep up, engineering teams must move beyond manual pipeline management. This session provides a roadmap to the next generation of data engineering on Snowflake. Join us to see how you can spend less time managing infrastructure and more time building high-value data products.

title: WHAT'S NEW: SNOWFLAKE INTELLIGENCE AND CORTEX AGENTS FOR REAL BUSINESS IMPACT
description: AI is only as powerful as the context it understands. In this session, discover what’s new in Snowflake Intelligence, the enterprise intelligence agent built to turn all your knowledge into trusted business decisions. Learn how organizations are moving beyond dashboards to uncover the critical “why,” grounded in governed enterprise data and shared business definitions. Discover how Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Agents work together to move teams beyond static insights, enabling natural language intelligence, trusted reasoning and actionable workflows that help organizations analyze, act and drive outcomes with confidence.
speaker_title: Senior Product Marketing Manager, AI / ML

title: AI AGENTS, SNOWFLAKE AND DOMO: RUNNING A PRODUCT TEAM OF ONE
description: In this session, we show how a single developer built a full production application by combining AI agents, Snowflake and Domo. Snowflake powers the intelligence layer — ML scoring, Cortex AI Functions and data pipelines — while Domo provides the application framework and user experience for the business. Using AI agents as engineering teammates, the project followed a structured development process with shaping, sprints and iteration to deliver a deal intelligence platform in just weeks. Learn the operating model, architecture and development pattern that enables developers to turn Snowflake data into real AI-powered business applications.

title: AI IN ACTION: REAL-WORLD FSI PRODUCTION SHOWCASES
description: Leading financial institutions are already deploying AI to drive measurable ROI. This curated collection showcases the most impactful AI stories currently in production across the industry. Explore how your peers are moving from pilot to scale, leveraging the Snowflake AI Data Cloud to solve complex challenges in risk, customer experience and employee efficiency.
speaker_title: Head of Wealth and Asset Management

title: BUILDING AN OPERATIONAL DATA STORE USING SNOWFLAKE POSTGRES
description: We present a scalable architecture for a near real-time operational data store (ODS) on Snowflake using PostgreSQL as the source. By leveraging change data capture (CDC) via the PostgreSQL Write-Ahead Log (WAL), the system captures row-level changes with minimal source impact. The framework uses Snowflake Dynamic Tables and Streams to automate incremental ingestion and materialization. This creates a high-concurrency, low-latency environment for operational reporting and real-time apps, eliminating the overhead of traditional batch ETL.

title: DRIVING ADVANCED SUPPLY CHAIN AI USE CASES WITH SNOWFLAKE AT AT&T
description: The age of agentic AI depends upon solid business strategies fueled by data. AT&T Transformation & Supply Chain (TSC) has been on a multi-year journey using Snowflake and AI models to wrangle and transform data from third-party suppliers and corporate systems across the company to create a single version of truth for TSC data and turn it into actionable insights and recommendations. This session dives into that mission, and how we are building a robust, AI-focused semantic layer and data governance oversight program using Snowflake features and graph databasing to drive decision intelligence for value delivery.

title: EXECUTIVE HAPPY HOUR HOSTED BY WISDOM AI
description: Hosted by Wisdom AI, this partner-hosted happy hour invites executive attendees to network in a casual setting over drinks and light refreshments, available while supplies last.

title: FROM DASHBOARDS TO DECISIONS: HOW CAPITA TRANSFORMS CONTACT CENTERS WITH AI
description: Public sector contact centers face high demand, strict regulation and fragmented data. Capita, a leading UK AI-enabled outsourcer, partnered with Snowflake to unify operations and create a governed, real-time intelligence layer. Within four months, teams unlocked natural-language access to insights across siloed functions, reduced manual reporting and shifted from reactive dashboards to faster decisions. The result: managers freed to focus on coaching, training and agent well-being, and a clear model for operationalizing AI safely in live, regulated services.

title: SAP AND SNOWFLAKE: BUILD A BUSINESS DATA FABRIC TO FUEL ENTERPRISE AI
description: Make enterprise AI work in practice by unifying SAP and Snowflake into a governed, business-context-driven data foundation. This session introduces SAP Business Data Cloud and explores how the SAP and Snowflake partnership helps enable high-impact use cases across analytics, planning and AI. Learn how zero-copy, bidirectional data sharing connects trusted SAP data products with Snowflake’s capabilities. Discover how to preserve business context, maintain governance and accelerate enterprise AI with a scalable, unified data foundation.
speaker_title: SVP, General Manager – SAP Data & AI

title: TABLEAU AND SNOWFLAKE: DEMYSTIFYING THE OPEN SEMANTIC INTERCHANGE
description: Explore how Tableau and the Open Semantic Interchange (OSI) provide the essential metadata layer that ensures your metrics remain consistent and trusted for both humans and agents. You will learn how our current analytics integration and future roadmap for semantic interoperability allow agents to work seamlessly inside the systems that run your business.

title: UNLOCKING VALUE WITH SYNTHETIC DATA: PRIVACY-SAFE AT SCALE
description: This presentation introduces a privacy-first synthetic data platform designed to break data access bottlenecks in measurement, AI and experimentation. We demonstrate how aggregated, household-level data combined with synthetic data modeling enables scalable, high‑fidelity synthetic data sets that preserve real‑world statistical relationships without exposing sensitive data. The platform supports measurement validation, clean room onboarding, AI/agent testing and experimentation — enabling teams to build, test and innovate faster in a controlled, production‑ready environment.

title: USING MCP TO ORCHESTRATE COMPOSABLE IDENTITY RESOLUTION AT SCALE
description: Enterprise‑scale identity resolution demands coordinated matching, enrichment and hygiene across regions and compliance boundaries. This session shows how Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables composable architectures that link Snowflake’s native capabilities with region‑specific identity engines. Using dentsu’s approach with Cortex Search and intelligent routing, we’ll illustrate how MCP orchestrates complex workflows without moving sensitive data, scaling globally while preserving sovereignty and accelerating insight.

title: What's New: Swiftly Take Your Ideas to Production with Cortex Code
description: Transform your ideas into production-ready workflows faster by using the AI coding agent designed specifically for data to handle everything from admin, data engineering, machine learning and agent-building tasks. Learn how Cortex Code can simplify and automate your toughest tasks and help your team expedite time-to-value.

title: YOUR AI STRATEGY HAS A CONTEXT PROBLEM. ORCHESTRATION SOLVES IT.
description: Every enterprise has an AI strategy. Few have the foundation to deliver on it. Most treat context as something defined upfront and consumed downstream. Semantic layers define metrics. Ontologies model relationships. Neither captures what actually ran.

title: 80X FASTER DATA ENGINEERING: FROM PROMPTS TO PIPELINES WITH MAIA
description: What happens when complex data engineering work can be delegated to AI agents? In this session, Jason Mulvin, Director of Enterprise Data & Analytics at Sophos, shares how his team designs pipelines through prompting — accelerating development, testing and deployment. Sophos uses agents to generate pipelines, convert legacy workflows and analyze existing ones. In one example, a pipeline that would take five days was generated and validated in under 30 minutes, achieving 95-99% completion and producing automated tests. Sophos is now reviewing 1,400+ pipelines to identify optimizations and inconsistencies. This session shows how prompts translate into production pipelines.

title: AI-GUIDED MIGRATION: FROM MANUAL REWRITES TO AUTOMATION
description: Manual migration rewrites consume valuable engineering time. SnowConvert AI shifts the focus from labor-intensive code conversion to intelligent automation and orchestration. This session highlights innovations including Semantic Conversion (AST + Cortex AI) for high-fidelity SQL translation, AI-driven verification to resolve complex issues, automated data validation for schema and metrics parity, ETL conversion to dbt on Snowflake, and ecosystem repointing for tools like Power BI. Learn how AI-guided automation accelerates modernization and frees engineers to build, not fix.

title: BETTER TOGETHER: WHEN AI DATA AGENTS COLLABORATE WITH AI CODING AGENTS
description: Watch autonomous agents build a production data pipeline — live. Watch as a Snowflake customer shows how Cortex Code and Genesis Data Agents operate the entire data operations as one unified stack to ingest, map, code, test, deploy, monitor and self-heal data pipelines — autonomously. Multiple concurrently working agents build and utilize context graphs while collaborating in real time end to end. This is the "better together" story — with proof.

title: CONNECT INFLUXDB TO SNOWFLAKE: HOW CAPELLA SPACE USES SNOWPARK DATA SOURCE APIS
description: Learn how Capella Space used Snowpark DB-API to build a Python-based connector to InfluxDB and break the data silos between operational telemetry and analytics in Snowflake. We’ll walk through the architecture, show how developers used a standard DB-API pattern to move key time-series data into Snowflake, and share lessons learned that you can apply to your own data sources.

title: INDUSTRY USE CASES: DATA MODELING FOR ENTERPRISE SCALE AND AI READINESS
description: Join us for a C-level discussion on how Snowflake unifies product data, enables real-time analytics and drives measurable business impact. Attendees will learn how centralized product intelligence can transform decision-making at the executive level, supporting faster go-to-market strategies, operational efficiency and cross-functional collaboration.

title: MANAGE YOUR SNOWFLAKE COST EFFECTIVELY WITH SNOWFLAKE COST GOVERNANCE
description: Interested in learning how you can track and analyze your Snowflake spend and control your overall spend? If you are, this session is for you. Come learn about Snowflake’s new cost governance capabilities and how customers are leveraging them to manage Snowflake costs effectively.

title: NEW JERSEY DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION: STATE LONGITUDINAL DATA SYSTEM
description: The New Jersey Department of Education (NJ DOE), which oversees K-12 public education, selected Snowflake in 2021 to modernize its longitudinal education data platform. This replaced Oracle and legacy file workflows with a single, governed cloud platform for student and staff data, submissions and analytics. On Snowflake, the NJ DOE now loads weekly deltas and EOY snapshots, runs nine major SLEDS submissions (including student, staff and course rosters), and utilizes production integrations (Tableau, dbt). The result is streamlined data collection, improved quality, and accelerated statewide reporting and analytics.

title: POWERING INTELLIGENT CUSTOMER RECOMMENDATIONS AT DAVID YURMAN WITH SNOWFLAKE ML
description: Learn how David Yurman’s DM&A team leveraged Snowflake and dbt to build their first in-house, enterprise-scale recommendation system. To deliver personalized suggestions across diverse segments, the team developed high-fidelity analytical marts using a hybrid of content-based and collaborative filtering. By using dbt for orchestration and Snowflake as the ML serving layer, they eliminated external platforms, reduced complexity and improved performance. This modern architecture now serves as a scalable foundation for continuous innovation in customer personalization and eliminated the need for external ML platforms.

title: REINVENTING FP&A AT NOV: FROM EXCEL SPRAWL TO GOVERNED ANALYTICS WITH SIGMA
description: National Oilwell Varco (NOV) is a $9 billion global energy technology company operating across a complex landscape shaped by decades of acquisitions and more than 100 ERP systems. Historically, finance teams relied on spreadsheets, Access databases and siloed reporting processes — spending more time assembling data than analyzing it. By adopting Sigma on Snowflake, NOV built a governed finance data model that allows FP&A teams to explore data, drill from financial metrics into ERP transactions and collaborate on a shared source of truth. With this foundation in place, NOV is positioning its finance organization to move beyond reporting and toward AI-powered analysis and decision support.

title: WHAT’S NEW: AI-POWERED OBSERVABILITY AT SCALE WITH OBSERVE BY SNOWFLAKE
description: Snowflake is redefining observability with Observe by Snowflake, a lakehouse-native observability platform. Learn how organizations can scale cost-effectively to hundreds of terabytes of telemetry per day and share data across business and operational contexts using Apache Iceberg on a telemetry lakehouse foundation. We will demo AI SRE, an AI agent that accelerates enterprise reliability workflows, and show how teams can engage with it through the Observe UI or coding agents to boost engineering productivity.

title: WHAT'S NEW: INNOVATIONS IN DATA AND AI GOVERNANCE
description: Maintain rigorous control while scaling your AI enterprise. In this session, we dive into the latest innovations within Snowflake Horizon Catalog, our universal AI catalog with context and governance for AI over all data. Learn how Horizon Catalog powers the semantic layer to bridge the gap between technical metadata and business meaning. We also cover enhancements to interoperability and embedded open APIs (Apache Polaris and Iceberg REST Catalog), ensuring consistent policy enforcement across your entire data estate. Finally, we explore core governance, including external lineage updates, automated data classification and data quality monitoring.

title: AGENTIC PROCUREMENT: ACCELERATING DRUG DEVELOPMENT AT SANOFI
description: We’re accelerating time to market for new medicines by removing enterprise friction. Learn how we’re transforming procurement by combining Elementum AI workflows and agent orchestration with Snowflake to reinvent source‑to‑pay, freeing scientists and clinical teams to focus on life‑saving research. We’ll show how agentic intelligence moves beyond rules‑based bots to interpret policy, resolve exceptions and use near real‑time signals to drive faster cycle times, fewer touchpoints, smarter buying and aligned metrics. We’ll cover the journey, design principles, operating model changes and ways to scale responsibly toward autonomous enterprise operations.

title: BASECAMP HAPPY HOUR
description: Head to Basecamp Happy Hour to recharge and connect. Grab a drink, explore the ecosystem and engage with attendees, partners and Snowflake experts in a relaxed, social setting.

title: HOW SANOFI SCALES AI ACROSS 80 COUNTRIES WITH DATAIKU AND SNOWFLAKE
description: What does it take to scale AI across 80 countries in a highly regulated industry? Join Jacob Kuijpers, Head of Data Operations at Sanofi, and Conor Jensen, Field CDO at Dataiku, for a candid conversation on turning AI ambition into enterprisewide execution. Discover how Sanofi uses Snowflake as its global data foundation and Dataiku to connect business and IT, operationalize governance and accelerate the shift from pilots to production. Learn practical lessons on data quality, platform strategy and operating model decisions for scaling AI in a complex, regulated organization.

title: TF1 AND NETFLIX: DEPLOY ML MODELS IN A DATA CLEAN ROOM TO REINVENT MEDIA COLLAB
description: Learn how TF1 and Netflix are building a data clean room on Snowflake to collaborate on audience insights without exposing underlying data. We’ll walk through the end-to-end architecture, from data residency to deploying ML-trained models inside the clean room. You’ll see how strict governance, code validation and cost controls enable privacy-safe activation and measurement across broadcaster and streaming workloads.

title: THE FINANCIAL SERVICES AI, APPS AND DATA GUIDE WITH SNOWFLAKE
description: Data sharing has evolved from simple access to the essential fuel for autonomous execution. The new mandate is "data for agency" — transforming static shares into the intelligence that powers agentic workflows. This session brings to life Snowflake’s AI Data Cloud for Financial Services, moving beyond retrieval to delivering AI-ready data products and governed semantic views. Hear how industry leaders tap into this ecosystem to drive operational leverage and measurable outcomes. Learn how Snowflake enables institutions to securely share the contextualized data required to accelerate agent-driven use cases across banking, insurance, capital markets and payments.
speaker_title: Head of AI for Financial Services

title: THE FUTURE OF DATA IS SEMANTICS: HOW BLACKROCK AND SNOWFLAKE WILL LEAD THE WAY
description: A modern data ecosystem requires not just good quality, governed data, but semantic capabilities to empower business users in their BI tools of choice to drive AI. But what exactly are semantics? How are large companies like BlackRock incorporating semantics into their strategy? And what products is Snowflake building to empower our clients to meet their business needs? Join BlackRock and Snowflake for lively discussion on the future of semantics in data.

title: WHAT POWERS YOUR PLATFORM? CAPITAL ONE’S SHIFT TO COMPOSABLE MARKETING
description: Financial services marketers must balance speed and security. Capital One shows the way: By giving marketers self-serve access to unified data with a composable CDP, it cuts time to market for complex campaigns by 75%. In this session, learn how Capital One centralized data in Snowflake, connecting all customer interactions into profiles that can support acquisition strategies; democratized access with Hightouch’s composable CDP, while maintaining strict governance and security; and activated data across campaigns to drive more cross-sells, more efficient paid media and more personalized customer experiences.

title: EVAL-DRIVEN AGENT OPTIMIZATION WITH CORTEX CODE CLI
description: Transform agent debugging from guesswork into a measurable process. Using Cortex Code's agent-optimization skill and native Snowflake Cortex Agent Evaluations, you'll curate evaluation data sets from production logs, run benchmarks with metrics such as answer_correctness and tool_selection_accuracy, analyze failure patterns and iterate on agent instructions — all from the CLI. You'll practice the closed-loop workflow: benchmark → analyze failures → improve → validate. Walk away with a repeatable methodology for taking any Cortex Agents from prototype to production readiness.

title: HANDS-ON LAB: APACHE SPARK ON SNOWFLAKE
description: In this hands-on lab, you will learn how to develop, deploy, orchestrate and monitor PySpark applications on Snowflake. Discover how to execute heavy-lifting Apache Spark jobs directly where your data lives, eliminating siloed platforms and risky data movement. You will migrate existing code, automate pipelines and apply unified governance. Join us to see how our fully managed runtime simplifies your architecture, allowing you to focus on insights rather than infrastructure management.

title: IMPLEMENT SENSITIVE DATA GOVERNANCE IN SNOWFLAKE USING AI
description: Safeguarding sensitive data at scale is nonnegotiable for regulatory compliance. Join this essential hands-on lab to master the art of automated sensitive data discovery and protection. You will leverage the power of AI to instantly generate robust data protection policies, learn to troubleshoot policy issues and establish an airtight audit trail for access to sensitive data. Achieve compliance confidence with advanced data governance.

title: HANDS-ON LAB: PERFORMANCE TUNING AND COST OPTIMIZATION
description: In this interactive lab, participants will diagnose real-world performance bottlenecks and apply optimization techniques to reduce cost and improve query efficiency. Explore clustering strategies, warehouse right-sizing and query profile analysis in a guided, practical environment.

title: LAKEHOUSE TRANSFORMATIONS: BUILD PRODUCTION PIPELINES FOR YOUR ICEBERG TABLES
description: Stop pipeline sprawl and the cost of data duplication. In this advanced lab, you will learn to perform secure, in-place transformations across your entire data estate. You will connect externally managed Iceberg tables with Catalog Linked Databases to always work on fresh data without ETL, build efficient and declarative pipelines with Dynamic Tables for Iceberg preserving multi-engine access to your data, and implement business continuity to ensure your production data is always available.

title: Builders Keynote
description: AI is transforming what (and how) you build on Snowflake. From designing self-serve intelligence and architecting AI-ready data infrastructure to shipping production agents, builders are at the center of the biggest shift in data since the cloud. Through demos and customer stories, we'll learn how data practitioners are adapting and delivering more impact than ever before.

title: Training // Track 3 - Snowflake Platform Training + Exam - Wednesday
description: This session is designed for individuals with limited experience using Snowflake and provides a walkthrough of the AI Data Cloud architecture through interactive labs, guiding learners how to unify, integrate and share previously siloed data with virtually unlimited scalability and concurrency.

title: Activating Enterprise Audience Intelligence with Snowflake Intelligence
description: Acxiom receives inbound customer feeds that are transformed into a trusted, activation-ready Gold layer in Snowflake, enriched and identity-resolved into a governed customer/entity view, and protected with encrypted sensitive data controls. The business challenge isn’t whether we store and govern the data, it’s how fast leaders can turn data into decisions that improve campaign ROI while reducing risk. In this session, we show how Snowflake Intelligence enables marketers, analytics leads and executives to interact with governed Gold data in plain language to get board-ready answers and recommended actions without waiting on backlogs or writing SQL.

title: AI-Ready Data: Quality, Lineage and Root Cause at Scale
description: As organizations expand from traditional analytics into generative AI and LLMs, the cost of poor data quality has shifted — from misleading reports to hallucinating models. AI-ready data demands rigorous consistency, freshness and integrity. But as data flows from upstream sources through dbt transformations into downstream BI tools, visibility breaks at every border. In this session, we'll show you how to build a native data quality framework in Snowflake and pair it with cross-platform lineage, so root-cause analysis and impact assessment take minutes, not days.

title: AT&T’s Interoperable Iceberg Journey
description: AT&T is transitioning its data ecosystem to the Iceberg open-table format, aiming to achieve a single version of truth and seamless data interoperability across platforms including Snowflake, which reduces data duplication and operational costs. This architecture separates data, compute and metadata planes, allowing different compute engines to efficiently access and manage Iceberg tables while maintaining strict access controls and supporting both human and AI data consumers. This migration, supported by automation and platform partnerships, will cover 75% of AT&T’s analytic data by the end of 2026, simplifying data access, improving governance and accelerating business growth.

title: Building Enterprise AI Agents Using Snowflake Intelligence
description: In mid 2025, we launched the Snowflake GTM AI Assistant to 6,000 users across Snowflake sales and marketing organizations — our first full-scale enterprise deployment of Snowflake Intelligence. By year-end, the assistant had already answered more than 330,000 questions, helping users work faster and make better decisions. Since launch, we got so many questions about how to successfully develop, launch and scale reliable enterprise AI assistants for thousands of users. This session is about sharing our best practices so others can easily build similar enterprise agents that users love.
room: Basecamp South Theater 3 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Deploy, Version, Test and Manage Snowflake Openflow Connectors Using Cortex Code
description: Join us to learn and see recommended ways for addressing DevOps requirements when it comes to Snowflake Openflow Connectors. A demo will show how it is possible to deploy an Snowflake Openflow Connector using a Cortex Code agent, make changes in the connector based on specific business requirements, version control the changes, configure GitHub automated testing and automate deployment of the new version of the connector in a production environment. See the entire process from a flow problem statement, to development, all the way up to production using the Cortex Code agent.
speaker_title: Principal Architect, Data Engineering, Applied Field Engineering Office

title: From First Principles: The Ideas That Built Snowflake — and What Comes Next
description: This fireside chat revisits the first principles that shaped Snowflake’s cloud-native data platform — from unifying structured and semi-structured data to separating compute and storage and embracing elastic scale. Joined by a customer who has been with Snowflake for over a decade, Snowflake’s co-founders will reflect on how revolutionary ideas years ago have evolved into becoming the industry standard, the lessons learned from real-world adoption, and how Snowflake is powering the shift to the agentic enterprise. We’ll close by exploring the next frontier: connecting data, intelligence and action to unlock AI at scale.
speakers: S Muralidhar; Benoit Dageville; Thierry Cruanes

title: Gallus Insights: AI-Powered Embedded Analytics for the Mortgage Industry
description: The most ambitious AI goals live or die by the quality of the underlying data. To truly harness AI, organizations must ensure they have a high-performance data foundation. See how Gallus Insights has built a robust, scalable architecture on Snowflake and seamlessly integrated ThoughtSpot Embedded to power customer experience. By leveraging cutting-edge agentic analytics, they deliver self-service insights to clients who can ask natural language questions and understand not just what's happening—but why. By combining Snowflake and ThoughtSpot, Gallus is experiencing 10x faster performance and reduced data costs and turning complex data into a competitive advantage.
room: Vertical Village Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall B)

title: Get ROI from Your Agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, MCP and Snowflake
description: AI agents are no longer a research experiment. They are running in production, closing support tickets, managing data pipelines and making decisions at enterprise scale. This session shows you how to architect, deploy and operate production-grade AI agents on AWS, from a single agent to complex multiagent systems. Using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, walk through real-world design patterns covering secure serverless deployment, tool and API integration via MCP, persistent memory, identity and access management, and end-to-end observability. See how AgentCore Gateway integrates with a Snowflake managed MCP server to orchestrate specialized subagents across your enterprise data ecosystem.

title: What's New: Connectivity for AI-Ready Pipelines, with AI
description: To power AI, your data needs a nerve system. For data engineers, the challenge is going beyond the cost of moving data to focus on the instant value of AI activation. This session explores how Snowflake’s connectivity offerings act as the connective tissue for your entire data estate, transforming pipelines from a bottleneck into a strategic enabler. We’ll dive into our AI-driven approach to automation and the latest engineering breakthroughs including Openflow, streaming, file processing and zero-copy integration. Learn how to build the connective tissue required to light up AI across the enterprise.
room: Basecamp South Theater 4 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: What’s New: Modernizing Your Data Estate in Snowflake
description: Modernizing a legacy data estate is complex — from embedded procedural logic to large-scale data movement and tight timelines. In this session, discover what’s new in helping organizations accelerate modernization on Snowflake. We’ll showcase the latest innovations that reduce risk, disruption and manual effort through automation, AI-assisted remediation, workload analysis and database virtualization. Learn how teams migrate with greater flexibility, minimize code rewrites, validate with confidence and transition to a scalable, cloud-native foundation for analytics and AI.

title: What's New: Smart Pipeline Development
description: Data engineering is at a crossroads: AI is both the product to build and the tool to use. It's reshaping what data engineers do and how they work. To keep up, engineering teams must move beyond manual pipeline management. This session provides a roadmap to the next generation of data engineering on Snowflake. Join us to see how you can spend less time managing infrastructure and more time building high-value data products.
room: Builders Hub Theater (Basecamp, South Hall D)

title: Beyond Ingestion: How Zendesk Scales Global Insights with Fivetran and Snowflake
description: To power AI-driven customer insights, Zendesk needed to unify product telemetry and enterprise data. Legacy pipelines meant a single connector could take months to deliver value. By replacing a homegrown Airflow and custom connector stack with a Snowflake-powered data platform, Zendesk dramatically accelerated delivery. Insights that once took months now take weeks. In this session, learn how Zendesk achieved a 4x increase in connector output and scaled to more than 30 data sources with a lean team. We’ll explore the shift from siloed systems to a unified semantic layer — and how to prepare your data stack for custom SDK connectors, automated transformations and unstructured data.
room: Vertical Village Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall B)

title: Building Powerful AI Data Tools with AI Functions and Agentic Search
description:
Building AI applications in the age of agents demands a platform that turns vast enterprise data into
real business outcomes. Snowflake Cortex AI Functions deliver the core primitives — classify, extract,
summarize and analyze — to build powerful AI pipelines directly in Snowflake. AI Function Studio
accelerates time to value with managed quality optimizations, multimodal support and built-in cost
controls. Add agentic search, and intelligent systems can now orchestrate analytical workflows across
thousands of documents that traditional RAG can't handle. One platform. Enterprise-grade AI, end to
end.
speakers: Siddharth Dwivedi; Jessie E Felix Felix

title: Causality Data for Marketing: Deploy Valuable AI Personalization on Snowflake
description: Marketing teams run thousands of experiments, but the learnings don’t always translate into better results. Why? We’re scaling our campaigns on the wrong data. This session introduces the agentic context graph built on the Snowflake AI Data Cloud. It’s a warehouse-native learning layer that continuously captures customer context, actions and outcomes to power AI decision-making. Walk away with a blueprint for turning results from thousands of experiments into compounding intelligence, helping you scale smarter campaigns and guarantee growth.
room: Basecamp South Theater 4 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Executive Lunch Hosted by Kumo
description: Hosted by Kumo, this partner-hosted lunch brings executive attendees together to network and recharge over a complimentary meal, available while supplies last.

title: Optimize Your Entire Lakehouse with Snowflake
description: Join Snowflake's Apache Iceberg Product Leaders to understand the different interoperable lakehouse architectures now supported, the tradeoffs for each, and how Snowflake can integrate in your infrastructure. We'll share how to bring Snowflake to your data managed by your catalog, the benefits you can expect as you graduate to Horizon Catalog, and we'll cover Snowflake Storage for Iceberg Tables. With each step, Snowflake improves performance, effort and costs.

title: Replatforming 161 Data Products: How We Scaled Secure Delivery with Snowflake
description: Data providers have traditionally relied on bulk file delivery to replicate data — custom extracts, long build times and independent client ingestion pipelines that can introduce version skew and data drift between provider and consumer. In this session, we walk through how our data engineering team replatformed 161 highly customized property and analytics products from file-based delivery to Snowflake using secure views and private listings. We’ll cover the architecture, operational decisions and governance patterns that preserved customization, protected intellectual property and supported cross-region distribution — while reducing customer time-to-value from weeks to hours.

title: Scaling Smart: Optimization Framework Behind Samsung Ads DMP's 73% Cost Savings
description: Samsung Ads achieved a 73% cost reduction by implementing a structured optimization framework across compute, storage and workload governance. This session breaks down the methodology, monitoring mechanisms and cultural changes that sustained those gains — without sacrificing performance.
room: Basecamp South Theater 3 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: What's New: Agentic ML in Snowflake
description: Learn how the latest agentic capabilities in Snowflake ML accelerate productivity for your ML teams. Join us for new feature overviews and a live demo showcasing our latest innovations.

title: What's New: Innovations in Data and AI Governance
description: Maintain rigorous control while scaling your AI enterprise. In this session, we dive into the latest innovations within Snowflake Horizon Catalog, our universal AI catalog with context and governance for AI over all data. Learn how Horizon Catalog powers the semantic layer to bridge the gap between technical metadata and business meaning. We also cover enhancements to interoperability and embedded open APIs (Apache Polaris and Iceberg REST Catalog), ensuring consistent policy enforcement across your entire data estate. Finally, we explore core governance, including external lineage updates, automated data classification and data quality monitoring.
room: Builders Hub Theater (Basecamp, South Hall D)

title: When AI Runs the Journey: How MoneyLion Simplified Marketing at Scale
description:
AI isn’t a tool: It’s an opportunity to reinvent business models, team roles and relationships with customers. In this session, hear from leaders at MoneyLion who have transformed their business with AI. They’ll share:


	How they’ve replaced thousands of fragmented journeys and competing product priorities with customer-first marketing via AI Decisioning on Snowflake
	How marketing, analytics, engineering and data science teams are collaborating and redefining their roles as AI allows them to delegate manual tasks
	The pragmatic playbook they’ve developed to test and adopt impactful AI within Snowflake and the larger martech ecosystem
room: Basecamp South Theater 1 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: AI-Powered R and Python Data Science You Can Actually Trust
description: Your AI coding agent can query data and generate apps. But can it match how data scientists actually work — and can your team inspect the work, reproduce it and run it anywhere? The Posit Team Snowflake Native App brings a governed, code-first data science platform directly into Snowflake — supporting both Python and R, including the only managed R runtime. See how AI-assisted workflows backed by Snowflake Cortex AI LLMs help data scientists explore data grounded in semantic models, build interactive data products and move to production — all without sacrificing reproducibility or portability. It's AI-assisted, open source-powered and production-ready on Snowflake.
room: Basecamp South Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: Architecting Semantic Memory: Scaling Domain Wisdom with Snowflake Intelligence
description: In dynamic SaaS environments, domain context is the ultimate bottleneck. Our team found that data scientists were trapped in request queues as consumers struggled to keep pace with shifting product schemas and reporting nuances. This session shares our journey of using Snowflake Intelligence to scale domain wisdom through building “semantic memory.” We share the practical lessons learned from extracting scientist-level nuance into reusable metadata to create AI "digital twins" in Snowflake Intelligence. We share practical tips and learnings in architecting a "memory" layer and our ongoing efforts to ensure agent reliability as our product and its data evolve.
room: Basecamp South Theater 4 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Automating Governed Analytics with Qlik MCP and Snowflake Cortex Code
description: Learn how to deliver governed, explainable AI-assisted analytics on Snowflake by pairing Qlik MCP with Snowflake Cortex Code. We’ll show how to encode analytics standards as reusable “skills” that guide LLMs to generate consistent master dimensions and measures, then automatically assemble analytics app assets — KPIs, tables and filters — all driven by AI. You’ll see robust load-script patterns (naming, date/time handling, verification) and a metadata-first approach that keeps KPIs stable with set analysis.
room: Basecamp South Theater 1 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: Building a Cross-Cloud Data Platform with Iceberg, Horizon Catalog and Pulsar
description: Toyota Motor Europe (TME) set out to unify vehicle profile data across multiple clouds without duplicating it. This session shows how TME built a cross-cloud data strategy using Snowflake Open Catalog and Iceberg tables, integrating managed Apache Pulsar as a streaming backbone. Learn how TME connected cloud environments through external Iceberg tables for a zero-copy approach, and how separate maintenance jobs complemented Open Catalog by compacting metadata for consistency and governance. We also explain why migrating to Horizon Catalog improved interoperability and scalability, and the steps TME followed to combine Pulsar, Iceberg and Open Catalog to power the vehicle profile.
speaker_title: Data & AI Engg, Platform Technical Owner
room: Builders Hub Theater (Basecamp, South Hall D)

title: Cost Optimization at Scale: Booking.com’s Journey with SELECT
description: In this session, Ian Whitestone, co-founder and CEO of SELECT, and Adam Healy, Senior Data Platform Engineer at Booking.com, will share how Booking.com has scaled their Snowflake data platform to thousands of users and millions of workloads processed per day, all while keeping costs in check and measuring ROI.
room: Basecamp South Theater 3 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Data Engineering for AI: dbt Projects, Semantic Views and Cortex Code
description: Make your data AI-ready with the powerful combination of dbt Projects and Snowflake Semantic Views. This session demonstrates how to leverage both SQL and Python DataFrame models in dbt for flexible data engineering that appeals to Spark developers and SQL practitioners alike. Explore semantic layers, the Open Semantic Initiative (OSI) and best practices for managing semantic view lifecycles in Snowflake. Watch Cortex Code's AI coding agent accelerate dbt Project development in real time, and learn to automate deployments with Snowflake CLI. Walk away with a complete, modern approach to building AI-ready data pipelines that empower both AI models and analytics tools.

title: Data Exfiltration and Ransomware Protection: Guardrails for Regulated Industries
description: Implement a robust zero trust architecture to safeguard highly regulated data from contemporary threats. This session focuses on establishing advanced guardrails, network and identity boundaries to prevent data exfiltration at its origin. Attain superior cyber resilience and proactive ransomware protection by neutralizing unauthorized access. We will demonstrate the integration of DSPM for comprehensive visibility, leveraging insights to inform the new data movement policies and restrict high-risk information to approved zones. Conclude by exploring how the trust center serves as your unified security analytics hub for real-time risk monitoring and an audit-ready security posture.

title: From Evaluation to Co-Innovation: How SoFi Built a Semantic Layer with Snowflake
description: In 2024, SoFi chose to co-develop a semantic layer directly with Snowflake rather than buying a third-party tool. Join us to learn how this strategic partnership transformed our data strategy. This session goes beyond the standard implementation story. We’ll share how we deployed the semantic layer within the SoFi data platform to establish a "single source of truth" and create the backbone for our gen AI and self-serve capabilities. We will unpack our real-world architecture, the challenges we faced and tactical lessons learned so you can accelerate your own journey.

title: Full Throttle from Day One
description: This fast-paced executive conversation takes different positions on how organizations should activate the Snowflake platform. Through structured debate across five platform pillars and the governance framework connecting them, the session surfaces the real decisions leaders face when building an AI-ready data platform. The discussion contrasts the urgency to deliver AI outcomes with the architectural discipline required to avoid long-term technical debt. The session provides a balanced perspective, equipping technical leaders with language to communicate business value and giving executives the architectural insight needed to make stronger platform decisions.

title: Leaders from Affirm, Booking.com, DoorDash and Indeed Discuss Apache Iceberg
description: Curious about Apache Iceberg? Want to learn from data leaders from the world's biggest data companies? Join us for a fireside chat rich with practical experiences, frameworks and key lesssons as industry leaders from Netflix, Booking.com, Doordash and Indeed discuss how  they are modernizing their architectures with Iceberg. Learn about their vision, investment areas in the next years, and how Iceberg is unlocking value faster while reducing costs.
speakers: Dimitar Nedev; Sergey Zavgorodni; Ankit Singh

title: The Agentic Enterprise: AI, Trusted Data and the Future of Applications
description: For decades, enterprise software promised productivity but delivered complexity: fragmented SaaS stacks, dark data and critical workflows still running in spreadsheets. AI is rewriting that model. As the cost to build software approaches zero, advantage is shifting to organizations that build intelligent applications on trusted enterprise data. A new paradigm is emerging: the agentic enterprise, where AI agents help teams analyze data, automate workflows and accelerate decisions. In this session, Sigma's CEO, Mike Palmer, explores how trusted data in Snowflake enables business users to analyze data, build solutions and act instantly within a secure, governed platform.
room: The Alpine Clubhouse Executive Theater (Moscone South, Level 3)

title: The Future of Telecom: Agentic Workflows on Intelligent Infrastructure
description: AI-driven automation, decision intelligence, cloud/edge computing and open architectures are transforming telecom networks into intelligent infrastructure — shifting connectivity from a cost center to a value platform. Navigating this requires a unified data foundation, a clear AI strategy and high-value use cases with measurable ROI. See how telcos unify network, OSS/BSS and enterprise data in the Snowflake AI Data Cloud. Learn how to reduce cost, monetize connectivity, hit sustainability targets, speed up rollout, improve resilience and enhance customer experience. Discover how Snowflake transforms network operations, optimizes investments and powers agentic workflows.

title: Unified Ingestion: Redefining Economics for Batch and Streaming Ingestion
description: For years, data engineers had to choose between batch and streaming based on costs, not latency. No more. In this deep dive, we pull back the curtain on the unified ingestion platform that powers Snowflake’s file-based and streaming workloads. We will explore the architectural overhaul and optimizations that allowed us to provide the new data volume-based pricing model for ingestion that redefines economics. Learn how the new pricing model reflects true resource consumption, providing better predictability and lower TCO.

title: Zero Copy, Zero Friction: Build Agentforce Agents at IDE Speed
description: The role of the developer is shifting from manual configuration to directing AI coding agents that build for you. Join us to see a new, high-velocity developer experience for Agentforce that replaces traditional setup with a fluid, AI-native workflow. We’ll demonstrate how to use AI coding agents (such as Claude Code) to rapidly design and iterate on agents that activate your Snowflake data via zero-copy.
room: Vertical Village Theater 2 (Basecamp, South Hall B)

title: 12 Million Queries, 2,500 Users: How Siemens Energy Scales AI with Alteryx
description: Siemens Energy needed to scale analytics across a global enterprise — not just access but governance and performance across more than 2,500 users and 12 million queries a year. Learn how it built an architecture where Alteryx pushes analytics directly into Snowflake, eliminating extraction and keeping compute where the data lives. The centerpiece: custom Alteryx workflows that call Snowflake Cortex AI natively, embedding generative AI into production pipelines without rebuilding workflows or bypassing governance. Walk away with a concrete model for scaling self-service analytics, integrating Cortex AI through Alteryx, and giving business teams a path from data to AI-driven decisions.
speaker_title: Data Science & ML Expert | Alteryx ACE
room: Basecamp South Theater 3 (Basecamp, South Hall C)

title: Accelerate and Automate: Mastering Snowflake ML with Cortex Code
description: Experience the next level of MLE productivity. This session provides a deep dive into Cortex Code, a massive accelerator designed to automate Snowflake ML pipelines from ingestion to production. We will demonstrate how Cortex Code meets machine learning engineers in their preferred environments to simplify the full lifecycle of enterprise models. Whether you are looking to reduce technical debt or scale your ML operations, join us to see how to build faster, smarter and more resilient pipelines at scale.
room: Builders Hub Theater (Basecamp, South Hall D)

title: Exploding the BOM: Advanced Analytics for Manufacturing Decision-Making
description: Are you ready to unlock the full potential of your Bill of Materials (BOM) data? Join us to discover how L3Harris Technologies revolutionized BOM management for its core product portfolio using Snowflake’s cutting-edge features. We’ll explore how recursive SQL, Dynamic Tables and elastic compute scaling can transform static BOMs into a dynamic, time-aware, fully exploded data asset — delivering insights that were previously out of reach. Learn how this approach empowers manufacturing teams to spot engineering change patterns, track component obsolescence and proactively address supply chain risks.
room: Vertical Village Theater 1 (Basecamp, South Hall A)

title: SciPlay Accelerates Revenue Growth with a Unified AI Platform
description: SciPlay, a leader in social casino and casual gaming, modernized a fragmented data environment to accelerate player acquisition, engagement, monetization and retention. Through a zero-egress strategy, SciPlay consolidated its stack into the Snowflake AI Data Cloud. Using SnowConvert AI, they migrated from Databricks Spark to Snowflake Openflow for streaming and from Databricks ML to Snowflake ML, eliminating data hops and enabling governed MLOps with Model Registry. With 20+ AI agents deployed, SciPlay improved time to value, productivity and revenue efficiency to help offset rising user acquisition costs.

title: Snowflake Intelligence: Your Team's Most Complex 'Whys' at Your Fingertips
description: Snowflake Intelligence has evolved from conversational Q&A to an end-to-end insights platform. This session unveils capabilities reshaping how enterprises consume data. See how we move beyond "what happened" to answer complex "why" questions with root cause analysis for actionable insights. Explore our new visualization experience: charts you can save, subscribe to and share, replacing static dashboards with a seamless conversational workflow. We'll demo high-IQ features including zero-shot forecasting, anomaly detection with proactive alerts and memory for personalized answers. Whether you're a business user or data team, discover how SI is becoming the hub for enterprise intelligence.

title: Truist and Cognizant: Operationalizing AI at Scale with Trusted Enterprise Data
description: As enterprises shift from AI experimentation to scaled production, trusted and well‑governed data becomes essential. In this session, Truist and Cognizant share how they are modernizing their data ecosystem on the Snowflake AI Data Cloud to enable secure, governed, real‑time access for analytics, machine learning and generative AI.
